TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241563. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 9 side b of tape: Christian songs to Western tunes by Li Ming. The song titles are: 1) May You Forgive My Sin; 2) What a Friend We Have in Jesus; 3) Praise the Name of the Lord; 4) Jesus Saves; 5) Jesus' Blood is Very Powerful. Recorded in 1950s.
